def: Pertaining to, or derived from, cahinca, the native name of aspecies of Brazilian Chiococca, perhaps C. recemosa; as, cahincicacid.
The more liquid or volatile portion of certain oily substance,as distinguished from stearoptene, the more solid parts. [Writtenalso elaoptene.]
A loud burst of laughter, a horse laugh. "A hearty low guffaw."Carlyle.
The red-breasted or gray snipe (Macrorhamphus griseus); --called also brownback, and grayback.
To sprout; to bud; to shoot; to begin to vegetate, as a plantor its seed; to begin to develop, as a germ. Bacon.
